title: Notice of Rooken Smith Street closure on Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that access from Louis Fourie Road to Rooken Smith Street will be closed for construction work from 6 November until 21 November (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that access from Louis Fourie Road to Rooken Smith Street will be closed for construction work from 6 November until 21 November (weather permitting)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Local businesses will have alternative access via the Shell Garage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction.","html":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
